lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਜਲਾਵਹਿ ਅੰਗੁ ਆਪੁ ਵਿਗੋਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik agan jalaaveh ang aap vigovahee |
lines.english: Some burn their limbs in fire, damaging and ruining themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਨਗਨ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਨਂ‍ੀਦ ਨ ਸੋਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik nagan fireh din raat naneed na sovahee |
lines.english: Some wander naked day and night and never sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਨਿ ਖਸਮ ਦੁਆਰਿ ਜਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹੀ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sohan khasam duaar ji satigur sevahee |15|
lines.english: Those who serve the True Guru, are embellished and exalted in the Court of their Lord and Master. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਤਨੁ ਛਾਰੁ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਿ ਰੋਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai tan chhaar kiaa keh rovahee |
lines.english: Without the Name, the body is reduced to ashes; what good is it to speak and cry then?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਵੇਲੈ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਤਾਂ ਦਰਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa amrit velai boliaa taan dar sunee pukaar |
lines.english: The rainbird chirps in the ambrosial hours of the morning before the dawn; its prayers are heard in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਘੈ ਨੋ ਫੁਰਮਾਨੁ ਹੋਆ ਵਰਸਹੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: meghai no furamaan hoaa varasahu kirapaa dhaar |
lines.english: The order is issued to the clouds, to let the rains of mercy shower down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਰਖਿਆ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau tin kai balihaaranai jinee sach rakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who enshrine the True Lord within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਭ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naame sabh hareeaavalee gur kai sabad veechaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Name, all are rejuvenated, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੀਹਾ ਇਵ ਤੇਰੀ ਤਿਖਾ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਜੇ ਸਉ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: baabeehaa iv teree tikhaa na utarai je sau kareh pukaar |
lines.english: O rainbird, this is not the way to quench your thirst, even though you may cry out a hundred times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਹਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saahib man vasai vichahu jaeh vikaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Lord and Master abides in the mind, corruption and evil leave from within. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਦਰੀ ਉਪਜੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: nadaree satigur paaeeai nadaree upajai piaar |
lines.english: By God's Grace, the True Guru is found; by His Grace, love wells up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਜੈਨੀ ਉਝੜ ਪਾਇ ਧੁਰਹੁ ਖੁਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik jainee ujharr paae dhurahu khuaaeaa |
lines.english: Some are Jains, wasting their time in the wilderness; by their pre-ordained destiny, they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨੑਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tin mukh naahee naam na teerath naaeaa |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is not on their lips; they do not bathe at sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਥੀ ਸਿਰ ਖੋਹਾਇ ਨ ਭਦੁ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hathee sir khohaae na bhad karaaeaa |
lines.english: They pull out their hair with their hands, instead of shaving.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਪਤਿ ਨ ਕਰਮੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tin jaat na pat na karam janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: They have no status, no honor, and no good karma. They waste away their lives in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਚਿਲ ਰਹਹਿ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kuchil raheh din raat sabad na bhaaeaa |
lines.english: They remain unclean day and night; they do not love the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਆਚਾਰੁ ਨ ਕਿਨ ਹੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai aachaar na kin hee paaeaa |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one achieves a lifestyle of good conduct.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਜੂਠੈ ਵੇਜਾਤਿ ਜੂਠਾ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man jootthai vejaat jootthaa khaaeaa |
lines.english: Their minds are false and impure; that which they eat is impure and defiled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣਿ ਸਰਸੀ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saavan sarasee kaamanee gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: In the month of Saawan, the bride is happy, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh oankaar sach samaaeaa |16|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is absorbed in the True Lord God, the Universal Creator. ||16||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣਿ ਦਝੈ ਗੁਣ ਬਾਹਰੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saavan dajhai gun baaharee jis doojai bhaae piaar |
lines.english: In Saawan, she who has no virtue is burned, in attachment and love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sadaa suhaaganee gur kai het apaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, she is a happy soul-bride forever; her love for the Guru is unlimited. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਉ ਹਠਿ ਨ ਪਤੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa alakh abheo hatth na pateejee |
lines.english: The True, Unseen, Mysterious Lord is not won over by stubbornness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਿਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਈ ਸਭੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak pir kee saar na jaanee sabh seegaar khuaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, she does not appreciate the value of her Husband Lord; all her decorations are worthless. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਰਾਗ ਪਰੀਆ ਰਾਗਿ ਨ ਭੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik gaaveh raag pareea raag na bheejee |
lines.english: Some sing according to traditional ragas, but the Lord is not pleased by these ragas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਨਚਿ ਨਚਿ ਪੂਰਹਿ ਤਾਲ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਕੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik nach nach pooreh taal bhagat na keejee |
lines.english: Some dance and dance and keep the beat, but they do not worship Him with devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਅੰਨੁ ਨ ਖਾਹਿ ਮੂਰਖ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: eik an na khaeh moorakh tinaa kiaa keejee |
lines.english: Some refuse to eat; what can be done with these fools?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਹੋਈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਕਿਵੈ ਨ ਧੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa hoee bahut kivai na dheejee |
lines.english: Thirst and desire have greatly increased; nothing brings satisfaction.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਵਧਹਿ ਕੈ ਲੋਅ ਖਪਿ ਮਰੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: karam vadheh kai loa khap mareejee |
lines.english: Some are tied down by rituals; they hassle themselves to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜਈ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa naam sansaar amrit peejee |
lines.english: In this world, profit comes by drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਅਸਨੇਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਘੀਜਈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: har bhagatee asanehi guramukh gheejee |17|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs gather in loving devotional worship of the Lord. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਲਾਰ ਰਾਗੁ ਜੋ ਕਰਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh malaar raag jo kareh tin man tan seetal hoe |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who sing in the Raga of Malaar - their minds and bodies become cool and calm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਏਕੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਏਕੋ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee ek pachhaaniaa eko sachaa soe |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they realize the One, the One True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan sachaa sach man sache sachee soe |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are true; they obey the True Lord, and they are known as true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਹੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: andar sachee bhagat hai sahaje hee pat hoe |
lines.english: True devotional worship is deep within them; they are automatically blessed with honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਰਾਹੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kalijug meh ghor andhaar hai manamukh raahu na koe |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, there is utter darkness; the self-willed manmukh cannot find the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: se vaddabhaagee naanakaa jin guramukh paragatt hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, very blessed are those Gurmukhs, unto whom the Lord is revealed. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਇੰਦੁ ਵਰਸਦਾ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਂਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai hukam ind varasadaa tis kai sad balihaarai jaanau |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to the One, by whose Command the clouds burst forth with rain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦੁ ਵਰਸੈ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਮਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eind varasai kar deaa lokaan man upajai chaau |
lines.english: The clouds rain down mercifully, and joy wells up in the minds of the people.
